text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text: Guuuh…… I can't move my chopsticks anymore.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
…Well, let's not push ourselves. 
Good thing I only ate a little.

text_block_list.name: Stay Gold
text_block_list.text:
I'll eat if my stomach starts growling. 
…Thanks for the meal.

Stay Gold left the cafeteria without 
eating very much……
